name: agent-teams
description: Coordinate multiple Codex exec sessions as a configurable project team with shared task, inbox, outbox, logs, and final synthesis files.

interface.shortDescription: Run coordinated Codex teammate sessions from one task
interface.longDescription: Agent Teams launches a configurable Codex project team, coordinates teammates through shared task and inbox/outbox files, captures logs, runs peer review, and generates a lead synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Use agent teams to split this task across Product owner, Development lead, Developer, and Tester teammates.
